CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS float_test (a Float32, b Float64, c BFloat16) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO float_test SELECT round(randCanonical() * 100, 4) AS a, round(randCanonical() * 100, 10) AS b, toBFloat16(round(randCanonical() * 100, 4)) AS c FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10000;
SELECT sum(a) AS sum_a, sum(b) AS sum_b FROM float_test;
SELECT sumKahan(a) AS kahan_sum_a, sumKahan(b) AS kahan_sum_b FROM float_test;
SELECT a, b, c FROM float_test WHERE a < 0.5;
SELECT a, b FROM float_test WHERE b > 50.0 ORDER BY b DESC;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS float_vs_decimal(my_float Float64, my_decimal Decimal64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO float_vs_decimal SELECT round(randCanonical(), 3) AS res, res FROM system.numbers LIMIT 1000000;
SELECT sum(my_float) AS total_float, sum(my_decimal) AS total_decimal FROM float_vs_decimal;
SELECT a, b FROM float_test WHERE a + b < 100.0;
SELECT toBFloat16(a) AS a_bfloat16, toFloat32(b) AS b_float32 FROM float_test;
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM float_test WHERE a IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a;
SELECT a, b FROM float_test WHERE c IS NOT NULL AND c != toBFloat16(0);
SELECT CASE WHEN a > 0 THEN 'Positive' ELSE 'Negative' END AS sign_a FROM float_test;
SELECT a, b FROM float_test WHERE a / 0.0 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT b, c FROM float_test WHERE c = 0 / 0;
SELECT a, b, c FROM float_test WHERE b * c = Inf;
SELECT -Inf AS neg_inf, Inf AS pos_inf, NaN AS not_a_number FROM float_test;
SELECT (SELECT sum(a) FROM float_test) AS total_a, (SELECT sum(b) FROM float_test) AS total_b;
SELECT b, AVG(a) FROM float_test GROUP BY b HAVING AVG(a) > 50.0;
SELECT sum(a) + sum(b) AS total_sum FROM float_test WHERE a IS NOT NULL AND b IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS float_overflow_test (d Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO float_overflow_test SELECT 3.4028235E38 + 1 FROM system.numbers LIMIT 1;
SELECT d FROM float_overflow_test WHERE d = Inf;
